CommandsRep.Caption: Pyrolyse phenolique - UserMatTh precompile
CommandsRep.Commands:
! ------------------------------------------------------------ ! Prebuilt native Fortran UserMatTh material for inner body phe0 ! Solver units: m, kg, s, W, degree C ! ------------------------------------------------------------
/COM,Prebuilt Fortran UserMatTh pyrolysis model requested
PYRA = 333.0 PYREA = 64081.0 PYRN = 1.0 PYRDH = 418000.0 TO_K = 273.15
! TB,USER properties: ! 1 virgin conductivity ! 2 char conductivity ! 3 virgin specific heat ! 4 char specific heat ! 5 virgin density ! 6 char density ! 7 Arrhenius A ! 8 activation energy Ea ! 9 reaction order n ! 10 positive endothermic pyrolysis enthalpy ! 11 Celsius-to-Kelvin offset
TB,USER,matid,9,11,THERM
TBTEMP,26.85 TBDATA,1,0.25,0.30,900,800,1250,700 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,326.85 TBDATA,1,0.32,0.35,1100,900,1200,650 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,626.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,0.40,1300,1000,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,776.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,0.44,1300,1250,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,926.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,0.49,1300,1550,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,1226.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,0.68,1300,1950,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,1426.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,0.81,1300,2060,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,1926.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,1.24,1300,2085,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
TBTEMP,2476.85 TBDATA,1,0.36,1.73,1300,2090,1150,600 TBDATA,7,PYRA,PYREA,PYRN,PYRDH,TO_K
! SVAR1 = alpha; SVAR2 = alpha rate TB,STATE,matid,,2 TBDATA,1,0.0,0.0
